procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1530
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1530 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: Cloud CLI Account and Storage Enumeration Burst

osquery.name: t1530_file_access
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action IN ('OPEN', 'READ') AND target_path NOT LIKE '/proc/%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation: 13 reproducible real sandbox runs across ≥3 executions, 1 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 1 osquery correlations, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
